issues.sample: The front driver-side tire experienced a full tire tread separation at highway speeds. It caused minimal damage to the vehicle's rim. No crash, other damage, or injuries occurred.  Tire size 255/35R19 96H XL

I got into a car accident that a ton of front end damage (the car was totaled) and none of the airbags deployed. I was alone in the car and wearing my seatbelt. I looked and found no noted recalls for the airbags in my specific car.

Fuel gauge does not move at all and showed tank was 5/8 full. However, when I was on the freeway, the vehicle stalled because I was out of gas. Luckily, I was on the right lane and therefore was able to pull over to the side without an incident. This is a new vehicle with faulty

narrative.headline: What 2023 Audi S5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Tires (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
